title: Locked Office Discovery Log
description: Security notes record Simon's office door locked from inside when the body was found at 10:08 PM.
significance: Establishes the misleading locked-room frame.
possibleInterpretations: Simon was attacked in the office.
Simon locked the office himself before collapsing.

title: Bloodied Bronze Brain Model
description: A heavy bronze brain model was found near Simon's body with blood transfer on one ridge.
significance: The apparent murder weapon, but its geometry must match the injury.

title: Office Blood Pattern
description: Blood drops cluster low beside the desk rather than radiating from a standing blow.
significance: The pattern is compatible with a collapse near furniture.
possibleInterpretations: Secondary wound after loss of balance.

title: Primary Internal Injury
description: Medical imaging identifies a deep internal injury inconsistent with the superficial office wound.
significance: Separates the fatal injury from the visible office injury.
possibleInterpretations: Office blow was not the main trauma.

title: Mismatched Injury Direction
description: The internal injury direction runs opposite the angle expected from the bronze model's position.
significance: Undermines the bronze model as the primary weapon.
possibleInterpretations: Body position changed before the secondary wound.

title: Separation Draft
description: A private legal draft shows Evelyn preparing for separation from Simon.
significance: Gives Evelyn motive but not opportunity at the earlier event.
possibleInterpretations: Red herring when tested against timing.

title: Jonah's Threatening Text
description: Jonah texted Simon that he was 'done being managed' one week before the gala.
significance: Creates a plausible family conflict.

title: Private Message Thread
description: Messages between Simon and Daniel show a concealed intimate relationship.
significance: Explains Daniel's private office visit.
possibleInterpretations: Reason for secrecy unrelated to the fatal corridor injury.

title: Duplicate Vendor Payments
description: Priya's ledger flags duplicate payments routed through accessibility and gala operations vendors.
significance: Introduces the financial trail Simon was reviewing.

title: Deputy Succession Memo
description: Lena drafted a memo arguing the institute needed new leadership after the gala.
significance: Gives Lena a career motive.

title: Ethics Complaint File
description: Marcus kept records of patient-consent complaints against Simon.
significance: Shows a serious institutional conflict.
possibleInterpretations: Not a direct route to the corridor attack.

title: Mira's Protest Speech
description: Mira planned a public denunciation of Simon's patient storytelling practices.
significance: Strong public anger, weak building access.
possibleInterpretations: Public pressure rather than hidden sabotage.

title: Unpaid Donor Pledge
description: Ezra's final pledge had not cleared despite Simon announcing it internally.
significance: Explains donor tension.
possibleInterpretations: Reason someone could impersonate donor urgency.

title: Lucid Interval Possibility
description: Dr. Bell confirms that Simon could remain conscious, speak, and deteriorate later after the primary head injury.
significance: Makes an earlier fatal event medically plausible.
possibleInterpretations: Speech after injury does not prove safety.
The presumed 9:16 PM death window may be wrong.

title: Control Room Radio Log
description: Owen's radio traffic places him in the security control room during the corridor window.
significance: Tests Owen's opportunity.

title: Missing Protective Edge
description: The Memory Arch's removable protective edge was missing after the corridor strike.
significance: Shows the exhibit was unsafe at the time of impact.

title: Noah's Inspection Photo
description: Noah's 5:55 PM photo shows the Memory Arch with its protective edge installed after inspection.
significance: Narrows sabotage to after Noah completed a safe handoff.

title: Tool Sign-Out Record
description: A toolkit assigned to Noah was signed out by Clara at 6:18 PM and returned after the gala began.
significance: Connects operations access to the equipment needed to alter the exhibit.
possibleInterpretations: Means to remove the protective edge.

title: 6:52 PM Corridor Photo
description: Tessa's corridor frame shows the Memory Arch still had its protective edge at 6:52 PM.
significance: Compresses the sabotage window.
possibleInterpretations: Edge present shortly before the strike.

title: Lanyard Fiber Comparison
description: A small fiber on the removed edge matches the weave and dye lot of Clara's staff lanyard.
significance: Places Clara's access materials in contact with the altered exhibit piece.

title: Stage Program Video
description: Wide video shows Evelyn beside Felix Ward on the atrium stage at 7:42 PM.
significance: Eliminates Evelyn for the earlier fatal event.
possibleInterpretations: Does not address later office access.

title: Lena's Live Segment Recording
description: Lena is continuously visible and speaking before the atrium audience at 7:42 PM.
significance: Eliminates Lena during the true fatal window.

title: Glass Elevator Stall Log
description: The elevator fault record and guest footage show Jonah trapped inside during the corridor strike.
significance: Eliminates Jonah for the true fatal event.
possibleInterpretations: Does not erase his family conflict.

title: East Gallery Demonstration Log
description: Daniel checked audience participants through a timed demo in the East Gallery at 7:42 PM.
significance: Eliminates Daniel for the earlier attack.
possibleInterpretations: Leaves later office visit to explain.

title: Dual-Access Lab Entry Record
description: Marcus entered the dual-access lab with a research fellow before the corridor window and exited after it.
significance: Eliminates Marcus from the true fatal scene.
possibleInterpretations: May still have motive to expose Simon.

title: Reflective Photo Near Corridor
description: Tessa's 7:41 PM photo catches Clara's reflection in a polished sign near Service Corridor C.
significance: Places Clara near the corridor immediately before impact.
possibleInterpretations: Contradiction to a continuous atrium alibi.

title: South Plaza Press Clip
description: Press footage shows Mira outside the building during the 7:42 PM window.
significance: Eliminates Mira for the true fatal scene.

title: False Donor Message
description: A message claiming Ezra Cole needed Simon in the donor lounge was sent through an internal staff-side queue at 7:39 PM.
significance: Redirected Simon toward the service corridor.

title: Ezra Departure Receipt
description: Car service and lobby footage place Ezra outside the institute before the false message was sent.
significance: Eliminates Ezra from sending a genuine live request.
possibleInterpretations: Ezra did not send the message.

title: Rachel's Wording Note
description: Rachel recorded Simon saying a sentence with intact intent but odd substitutions at 8:43 PM.
significance: Adds behavioral evidence of neurological deterioration after the corridor event.

title: Accessibility Plan Annotations
description: Keisha's plans show Clara made practical route fixes later praised by Simon as institute leadership.
significance: Explains resentment without proving violence.

title: Speech Credit Line
description: Simon's speech notes credit leadership for route improvements without naming Clara or Keisha.
significance: Shows a public slight on gala night.
possibleInterpretations: Part of a larger motive pattern.

title: Clara's Abbreviation Pattern
description: The false donor message uses Clara's recurring shorthand for service routes and time blocks.
significance: Links the false message style to Clara's writing habits.
possibleInterpretations: She authored or drafted the message.

title: Storage Alcove Access
description: Badge logs place Clara entering the Service Corridor C storage alcove at 7:04 PM and leaving at 7:12 PM.
significance: Places Clara at the likely alteration point after the edge was last confirmed present.
possibleInterpretations: Opportunity to alter the Memory Arch.

title: Felix Stage Corroboration
description: Felix confirms Evelyn remained on stage with him during the true fatal window.
significance: Supports Evelyn's elimination.

title: Elevator Guest Video
description: A guest video shows Jonah waving angrily from the stalled glass elevator at 7:42 PM.
significance: Supports Jonah's elimination.

title: Atrium Broadcast Timestamp
description: The gala livestream timestamp places Lena at the lectern during 7:40-7:45 PM.
significance: Supports Lena's elimination.

title: Lab Witness Pairing
description: A research fellow confirms Marcus could not leave the dual-access lab alone.
significance: Supports Marcus's elimination.

title: Mira Exterior Check-In
description: A plaza livestream identifies Mira outside through the corridor event window.
significance: Supports Mira's elimination.

title: Donor Car Service Record
description: Ezra's car departed at 7:22 PM and his phone pinged away from the institute soon after.
significance: Supports Ezra's elimination and weakens the donor-message premise.

title: Loading Dock Crew Log
description: Noah is recorded at the loading dock with two crew members at 7:42 PM.
significance: Supports Noah's elimination after his safe inspection.
possibleInterpretations: Noah did not make the final alteration.

title: Delayed Head Injury Search History
description: A staff workstation linked to Clara searched for delayed head injury symptoms before the gala's final hour.
significance: Suggests prior knowledge that a victim might stay conscious before deteriorating.

title: Daniel Office Water Glass
description: Daniel's prints are on a water glass he admits giving Simon in the office at 8:37 PM.
significance: Explains Daniel's trace evidence without proving the fatal attack.
possibleInterpretations: Potential poison theory that lacks toxicology support.

title: Tessa Contact Sheet
description: Tessa's raw frames show a sequence around the corridor and later speech.
significance: Provides timestamps for the corridor and speech sequence.

title: Catering Service Break
description: Ana's prep list shows gaps when she could not personally see Clara.
significance: Weakens the continuous alibi.
possibleInterpretations: Opportunity hidden by a softened witness statement.

title: Sophie Triage Note
description: Sophie noted dizziness, word hesitation, and an offer of medical help shortly after the corridor strike.
significance: Supports an earlier injury and later deterioration.

title: Alcove Lock Maintenance Note
description: Eli's note confirms the alcove lock was functional despite staff complaints about sticking.
significance: Makes the badge log reliable.
possibleInterpretations: Lock issue not enough to explain false entries.

title: Police Referral Draft Naming Clara
description: Simon drafted a referral describing redirected institute payments and naming Clara as the employee to be terminated and reported.
significance: Establishes the strongest known pressure on Clara before the gala ended.
possibleInterpretations: Draft may not have been sent yet.

title: Rachel Audio Clip
description: Rachel's recording captures Simon calling the gala 'lucid but unmoored' with a confused laugh.
significance: Adds texture to Simon's abnormal post-strike behavior.

title: Board Personnel Note
description: Felix's notes say Simon planned a personnel action after the gala but do not name the staff member.
significance: Corroborates Simon had a post-gala action planned.

title: Volunteer Movement Card
description: Lucas's volunteer card lists Clara as the person who directed him to place the Memory Arch in Corridor C.
significance: Explains how the exhibit got into the corridor.

title: Martin's Care Termination Warning
description: Martin Finch's care facility warned that treatment would terminate unless overdue payments cleared.
significance: Shows why redirected payments would matter urgently to Clara.
possibleInterpretations: Possible motive tied to financial fraud.

title: Loose Marble Paperweight
description: A marble paperweight from Simon's shelf was found on the carpet and initially logged as a possible weapon.
significance: A plausible office object that does not match the fatal injury mechanics.
possibleInterpretations: Dislodged during collapse or emergency entry.

title: Clara Says Simon Never Lost Consciousness
description: Clara states that Simon never lost consciousness after the corridor incident and uses that to dismiss medical concern.
significance: Her own statement fits a lucid interval rather than an absence of danger.
possibleInterpretations: A defensive misunderstanding or manipulation of medical risk.

title: Ana Retracts Continuous Alibi
description: Ana admits Clara asked her to describe the catering-side alibi as continuous even though Ana only saw her intermittently.
significance: Breaks the strongest alibi Clara offered for the corridor window.
possibleInterpretations: Social pressure to simplify a statement.
